title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-26
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS and GREENHOUSE markdown files.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot checking on a greenhouse full of pixelated code-plants, holding a clipboard with a checklist.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor-headed robot in a digital greenhouse, checking on glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny clipboard with a checklist. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor-headed robot in a digital greenhouse, checking on glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny clipboard with a checklist.
